next_action.message:
Hi James,  

Thanks for sharing the details about your claim AUT-5513827. We’ve noted that the police report is on its way by next weekend—no rush, we’ll hold off until you send it.  

I’ve also noted your question about whether documentation is needed for that item. A team member will follow up shortly.  

Let me know if you need anything else. Thanks!
